prompt: Create a solution spec: A Web AppAI. Target user: Freelance copywriter with 3–10 clients. Solution: A web app that converts a raw brief (pasted text) into a polished proposal PDF in one click. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: A Lightweight SaasAI. Target user: Shopify store owner earning $10k–$100k/mo. Solution: A lightweight SaaS that monitors up to 20 competitor URLs and emails a daily price delta report. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: A One-page LinkAI. Target user: B2B SaaS founder with 10–100 customers. Solution: A one-page link customers open on mobile to record a 60-second testimonial video, no app install. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription
